1. $0.01 USD
2. Code completion and Next Edit suggestions
3. Enterprise, Organization, User (plus cost centers for chargeback)
4. Cost centers govern overage ceilings and Azure sub separation at enterprise or cost-center level.
5. GitHub is built on choice — model choice, agent choice, experience choice. Devs pick IDE/CLI/editor.
6. Zero-cost fallback is gone — all usage governed by available credits and admin budget controls.
